creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text: Note that https://github.com/DimitryAndric/freebsd-src/tree/llvm-15-update has now been updated to include https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=be39466a1035ffb13268cd63723e976898e9b91e, which fixes the DTrace "duplicate symbol" errors occurring in e.g. lang/perl5*, lang/ghc and some other ports using DTrace. (That means any existing lld 15 specific workarounds of adding --allow-multiple-definition or -z muldefs can be removed.)
